_comment_: Custom board definition for the Heltec Wireless Tracker V2 (HTIT-Tracker V2.3). PlatformIO's platform-espressif32 7.x doesn't include this board yet — we ship it inside the project so a fresh clone builds cleanly. Based on heltec_wifi_lora_32_V3 (same ESP32-S3FN8 + 8 MB flash). USB MODE & CDC flags: the V2 uses the ESP32-S3's built-in USB-Serial/JTAG peripheral (esptool reports 'USB mode: USB-Serial/JTAG'), not an external CP2102 bridge. USB_MODE=1 + USB_CDC_ON_BOOT=1 binds Serial to the USJ console so Serial.print is visible to the user's monitor. Setting these wrong = invisible Serial output (firmware runs fine but you can't see it).
name: Heltec Wireless Tracker V2
